metadata.description: Learning-with-Court workshops platform. Interactive technical and creative workshops that run inside Claude Cowork and Claude Code.

plugins.name: lwc
plugins.description: Run Learning-with-Court workshops in Claude. One plugin, many workshops. Install once, start any workshop you have access to. Requires @learning-with-court/cli@>=0.9.1 installed globally (npm i -g @learning-with-court/cli).
